build.description: Build the headless libretether-agent daemon (release). On Linux this includes Wayland/PipeWire support (run `run setup` for libpipewire-0.3-dev)

check.description: Format-check and lint just this crate

dev.description: Run the agent from source (pass subcommands directly, e.g. `run agent:dev enroll` / `run agent:dev run` / status / install)
